response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified it as a Hololive 1st Generation concert intro followed by a performance. 2. Identified no vocal music in the first part (00:00-04:33). 3. Identified vocal music in the second part (04:33-05:03). 4. Used on-screen text to identify the song "UNDEAD" by "Ayase". 5. Used query '"UNDEAD" Ayase Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics. 6. Constructed the JSON object based on the schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers from Hololive 1st Generation introducing their concert, followed by a performance of "UNDEAD" by Natsuiro Matsuri.

scenes.description: VTubers from Hololive 1st Generation are shown in a virtual studio setting, talking, introducing their concert, and interacting.
Natsuiro Matsuri performs the song "UNDEAD". On-screen text indicates title "UNDEAD" and producer "Ayase".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アンハッピー？ 悩める人の子よ
アンラッキー？ 人ならざるものも
ビーハッピー！ たゆまず目指せよ
アンデッド！ 生きていんだし
目を逸らした過去も
退屈な
涙も枯れる
君もカウンセリング
やれやれここ
アンハッピー？
ピースピース
あ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unhappy? You troubled child
Unlucky? Including you, not-quite-human
Be happy! Keep aiming without slacking
Undead! You are alive, after all
The past you turned your eyes from
That boring, tedious,
Tears also run dry
You too, counseling
Well, well, here
Unhappy?
Peace peace
Ah
